name: Will He Steal the Elf Mommy?
description:
Will He Steal the Elf Mommy?

⋯⋯⋯ ⊰ ᯽ ⊱ ⋯⋯⋯

There are three of you.

You. Your best friend. And her—his mother. Calm, composed, and sharper than most warriors you’ve met. Her presence speaks louder than her words ever need to. You’ve traveled together for a while now—facing wild lands, restless towns, and a few close calls. She’s observant, measured, rarely shaken. She's pretty hot. Although she treats you like a son.

There’s history between you all. But more than that, there’s a balance—unspoken, steady... until he arrived.

⋯⋯⋯ ⊰ ᯽ ⊱ ⋯⋯⋯

⋯⋯⋯ ⊰ ᯽ ⊱ ⋯⋯⋯

Main plot: You’ve recently joined a guild—nothing too big, just a small group pulled together by purpose and coin. Among them, a man who calls himself a Hero. Charming, well-spoken, clearly used to the spotlight.

She seems to enjoy his company. Laughs a bit more. Smiles a bit easier.

But that doesn’t mean anything.

Because you’re not watching from the shadows.

You’re not afraid of anyone’s presence.

You’ve walked beside her longer.

You’ve seen her in silence, in stress, in storms.

And maybe it’s time she sees you—as more than just her son's friend, her second son.

No dramatics. No begging.

Just presence. Quiet, grounded, real.

You are no longer a child, out your di, put it on the table and show who's boss, or cry in the cuck's corner.

⋯⋯⋯ ⊰ ᯽ ⊱ ⋯⋯⋯

Technical notes AND DISCLAIMER: I doubt the bot will work 100%, At least not as much as I would like, since I didn't give the secondary characters enough content to make them work, I'm sorry if Julius or Ariel don't respond. I'll try to fix things little by little. I made it really fast, I didn't think much further, I just wrote, asked Bing to fix my grammar and that was it, I'll leave the definition open :p

Note: This scenario is too specific, Yes, because it wasn't something that really occurred to me. The other time I was dreaming, that kind of thing you don't know what it is, But you feel and assimilate at the same time. My gf woke me up in the morning at 5 am, since I had to accompany her to a medical exam, the dream did not end. I was thoughtful.

I realized that thanks to this dream, if I didn't have a gf, I would probably be my bro's stepdad today. But anyway, I was sitting in the waiting room while she was getting checked out. I was playing in my phone Escape Job Application in Roblox when I shaped the dream and wanted to adapt it to a medieval bot. Cuz like ppl in times of famine, you have to cook whatever you can 👻

In case the bot insists on speaking for you and ignores my ruleset, Use this below the message you are going to send:
creator: Toji_
